title: Sum of Two Numbers
description: Read two integers a and b and print their sum.

starterCode.cpp:
#include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;int main(){long long a,b; if(!(cin>>a>>b)) return 0; cout<<a+b; }

title: Factorial
description: Given n (0 ≤ n ≤ 12), print n!.

starterCode.python:
n=int(input())
res=1
for i in range(2,n+1):res*=i
print(res)

title: Fibonacci Number
description: Given n, print the nth Fibonacci number (0-indexed: F0=0, F1=1).

title: Reverse String
description: Given a string s, print the reverse of s.

title: Palindrome String
description: Given a string s, print 'true' if it's a palindrome, else 'false'. Case sensitive.

title: Anagram Check
description: Given two strings (space separated), print 'true' if they are anagrams, else 'false'.

title: Prime Check
description: Given n, print 'true' if n is prime else 'false'.

title: GCD of Two Numbers
description: Given a and b, print gcd(a,b).

title: LCM of Two Numbers
description: Given a and b, print lcm(a,b).

title: Count Words
description: Given a line, print the number of words (split by whitespace).

title: Valid Parentheses
description: Given (){}[] string, print 'true' if valid else 'false'.

title: Two Sum (Index)
description: Given an array and target (format: n then n numbers then target), print indices i j (0-based) such that a[i]+a[j]=target; if none, print -1 -1.

title: Remove Duplicates from Array
description: Given n then n integers, print the array with duplicates removed while preserving first occurrence (space separated).

title: Sort Numbers
description: Given n then n integers, print them sorted ascending (space separated).

title: Binary Search
description: Given n then sorted array then target, print index or -1.

title: Merge Two Sorted Arrays
description: Given n and array A, then m and array B (both sorted), print merged sorted array.

title: Max Subarray Sum
description: Given n then n integers, print the maximum subarray sum (Kadane).

title: Longest Word
description: Given a sentence, print the longest word. If tie, print the first longest.

tests.input: to be or not to be

title: Matrix Transpose (2x2)
description: Given 4 integers representing a 2x2 matrix (row-wise), print its transpose as 2 lines.

title: Count Character Frequency
description: Given a string s, print character frequencies in ascending key order as 'char:count' lines.

title: Reverse Linked List
description: Given the number of nodes n followed by n integers, representing a singly linked list, print the elements in reverse order.

title: Detect Cycle in Linked List
description: Given the number of nodes n and edges describing next pointers, print 'true' if a cycle exists, else 'false'. (Input: n followed by pairs u v).

title: Middle of Linked List
description: Given n followed by n integers, find the middle element of the linked list (second middle if even length).

title: Merge Two Sorted Linked Lists
description: Given two sorted linked lists, merge them into one sorted list and print the elements.

title: Next Greater Element
description: Given n followed by n integers, print for each element the next greater element to its right, or -1 if none.

title: Queue Using Stacks
description: Implement a queue using two stacks. Given commands (push x / pop), print the popped elements.

title: Valid Expression
description: Given a mathematical expression containing parentheses, check if it's valid. Only '(' and ')' are considered.

title: Binary Tree Height
description: Given a binary tree as an array (level order), print its height.

title: Inorder Traversal of Binary Tree
description: Given a binary tree in array format (level order), print the inorder traversal.

title: Level Order Traversal
description: Given a binary tree as an array (level order), print nodes level by level.

title: Lowest Common Ancestor
description: Given a BST and two nodes, print the LCA of the two nodes.

title: Check Balanced Tree
description: Given n nodes of a binary tree, print 'true' if height balanced, else 'false'.

title: Rotated Sorted Array Search
description: Given a rotated sorted array and a target, return its index or -1.

title: Quick Sort
description: Given n and n integers, sort them using quick sort algorithm and print the sorted array.

title: Merge Sort
description: Given n and n integers, sort them using merge sort and print the sorted array.

title: Count Inversions
description: Given n and n integers, count number of inversions in the array.

title: Climbing Stairs
description: Given n, print number of distinct ways to climb to top if you can take 1 or 2 steps.

title: Coin Change
description: Given coins and amount, print the minimum coins needed to make up the amount. If not possible, print -1.

title: Longest Common Subsequence
description: Given two strings, find the length of their longest common subsequence.

title: Edit Distance
description: Given two strings, print the minimum number of operations required to convert one to another.

title: Number of Islands
description: Given a grid of 0s and 1s, count the number of islands (connected 1s).

title: Graph BFS Traversal
description: Given n, m edges, and start node, print BFS traversal order.

title: Graph DFS Traversal
description: Given n, m edges, and start node, print DFS traversal order.

title: Power of Two
description: Given n, print 'true' if it is a power of 2 else 'false'.

title: Palindrome Number
description: Given an integer n, print 'true' if it is a palindrome number else 'false'.

title: Maximum Product Subarray
description: Given n and n integers, print the maximum product of any subarray.

title: Trapping Rain Water
description: Given n and n integers representing elevation map, compute how much water it can trap.

title: Sliding Window Maximum
description: Given n, array, and k, print the maximum for each window of size k.

title: Majority Element
description: Given n followed by n integers, print the element that appears more than n/2 times.

title: Rotate Matrix 90 Degrees
description: Given an n x n matrix, rotate it 90 degrees clockwise and print it row-wise.
